description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is streamlined and painted primarily white with blue accents on the nose, wingtips, and tail fin. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy with side windows, suggesting seating for one or two occupants. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all fixed and non-retractable. The overall design is typical of light general aviation aircraft used for training or personal transport.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with blue and white coloring, tricycle landing gear, and a streamlined fuselage. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, with a nose-mounted propeller and conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-wing configuration, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the blue nose, cockpit windows, and the fixed main and nose landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, as well as the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective showing the blue tail fin, cockpit, and the fixed landing gear under the wings and nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single fixed nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
